old_value:
{"id":"project-LICHEN-uc2s","title":"node_server.py: RX_ENTER handler can hang indefinitely","description":"File: python/src/lichen/sim/node_server.py
Line: 516

_handle_rx_enter awaits rx_done.wait() with no timeout:

    await rx_done.wait()

If the simulation driver task (_simulation_driver) is cancelled or crashes before the RX timeout fires or a packet is delivered, the event is never set and this await hangs forever. This can happen when:
1. Server.stop() is called while a client is in RX mode
2. The driver task raises an unhandled exception

Should add a timeout or cancellation mechanism to prevent indefinite hangs.

Impact: Connection handlers hang forever, preventing clean shutdown; potential resource exhaustion.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:27:38.416135Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-12T06:27:38.416161Z"}

{"id":"project-LICHEN-uc2s","title":"node_server.py: RX_ENTER handler can hang indefinitely","description":"File: python/src/lichen/sim/node_server.py
Line: 516

_handle_rx_enter awaits rx_done.wait() with no timeout:

    await rx_done.wait()

If the simulation driver task (_simulation_driver) is cancelled or crashes before the RX timeout fires or a packet is delivered, the event is never set and this await hangs forever. This can happen when:
1. Server.stop() is called while a client is in RX mode
2. The driver task raises an unhandled exception

Should add a timeout or cancellation mechanism to prevent indefinite hangs.

Impact: Connection handlers hang forever, preventing clean shutdown; potential resource exhaustion.","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"AI Agent","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:27:38.416135Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-22T20:19:40.56589297Z","started_at":"2026-07-22T20:19:40.56589297Z","lease_expires_at":"2026-07-22T20:24:40.56589297Z","heartbeat_at":"2026-07-22T20:19:40.56589297Z"}

new_value: Added try/finally around RX_ENTER await with exit_rx_mode cleanup (entered flag). Prevents indefinite hang on cancellation/stop. Preserves original error handling. Tests pass (test_node_server.py). Commit 451d6c1bd.
